chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4643 of 2022 Parvez Arshad Chaudhry Versus Farzana Saleem and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For order on office objection No.18. 2. For orders on Misc. No.19982/2022 (Exemption/App). 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 21.11.2023 None present..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This petition in respect of an order passed by the Revisional Court in Civil Revision No.13/2022 arising out of an order under Section 12 CPC is pending since 04.08.2022 and the petitioner has not cared to have it fixed even once. Today non one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner and there is no intimation either. The petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
